creator: dspartz@yahoo.com
text:
Resync'ed CVS shadow reposity 8/19/2001

cd /usr
rm -rf ports
rm -rf src
cvs co -r RELENG_4.3.0_RELEASE world
cd src
make world
... (hours later)
Extracting config.h (with variable substitutions)

cc -O -pipe  -I/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl/../../../../contrib/perl5 -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl   -I/usr/obj/usr/src/i386/usr/include -c miniperlmain.c

cc -O -pipe  -I/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl/../../../../contrib/perl5 -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl   -I/usr/obj/usr/src/i386/usr/include -c opmini.c

cc -O -pipe  -I/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl/../../../../contrib/perl5 -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl   -I/usr/obj/usr/src/i386/usr/include  -L/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl/../libperl -static -o miniperl miniperlmain.o opmini.o  /usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/miniperl/../libperl/libperl.a -lm -lcrypt -lutil

    alignbytes=4, usemymalloc=n, prototype=define

    ld='cc', ldflags ='-Wl,-E -lperl -lm '

    libpth=/usr/lib

    libs=-lm -lc -lcrypt

    dlsrc=dl_dlopen.xs, dlext=so, d_dlsymun=undef, ccdlflags=' -Wl,-R/usr/lib'

    cccdlflags='-DPIC -fpic', lddlflags='-Wl,-E -shared -lperl -lm '



/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/../miniperl/miniperl -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/lib  -e 'use AutoSplit; autosplit_lib_modules(@ARGV)'  lib/*.pm lib/*/*.pm

AutoSplitting lib/Getopt/Long.pm (lib/auto/Getopt/Long)

sh writemain lib/auto/DynaLoader/DynaLoader.a > perlmain.c

cc -O -pipe  -I/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl/../../../../contrib/perl5 -I/usr/obj/usr/src/gnu/usr.bin/perl/perl   -I/usr/obj/usr/src/i386/usr/include -c perlmain.c
